English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Diane Sherrer collection
Sherrer, Diane.
4754
23.4 cubic feet. 23.4 cubic feet.
1969-2009. Manuscripts, Newspapers, Printed Materials Includes newspapers articles, running results, press notebooks, autographed posters, and a quilt made from running t-shirts. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 11 12 13 ======= 11 12 13 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 6876493
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
April 2010
EAD encoding:
Evan Earle, April 2010
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Sherrer was a sports running journalist and a competitive track, and road racer in distances ranging from the mile to the marathon; she co-founded the Finger Lakes Runners Club Women's Distance Classic and served as the Finger Lakes Runners Club Newsletter editor for nineteen years. She promoted women's running and encouraged women's team participation.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes newspapers articles, running results, press notebooks, autographed posters, and a quilt made from running t-shirts.
Cite As:
Diane Sherrer collection, #4754. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Running -- Training. Running. Finger Lakes Runners Club Cornell Masters Mile Finger Lakes Runners Club Women\'s Distance Classic
